payload.answer: No conflict and no memory change needed; the new information is a duplicate of the existing memory.
citations: Existing memory: "Sam from Goldman mentioned that he likes Bill Evans."
New: "Sam from Goldman said he likes Bill Evans."

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement matches the existing memory in substance: same person reference ('Sam from Goldman') and same preference ('likes Bill Evans'). No new entity or updated fact is introduced.

details: Determined they express the same fact with only wording variation.
Chose not to create a new durable memory card.

repair_options: Deduplicate the new statement and record no additional card.
